title: MemoryFormedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `memory_formed` event — a new memory node with its declared sensitivity. See spec/memory-delta-v1.md §5.1.

node_id.description: UUID v4 of the newly-formed memory node. Unique per emitter.

content.description: Textual content. MAY be replaced with "[REDACTED]" by a sync forwarder when `sensitivity` exceeds the forwarder policy.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity classification used by sync forwarders to decide whether to redact memory content before crossing a device boundary. Emitter-authored; not forwarder-mutable.

redacted.description: Present only on the wire when a sync forwarder has replaced `content`. Original events MUST NOT carry this field.

redacted_sensitivity.description: Original sensitivity retained after redaction so downstream receivers honor policy without seeing content.
